TrustChain
Create Escrow

Secure Smart Contract Escrow

TrustChain is a decentralized escrow payment system on the Polygon network. Lock funds securely, release upon delivery, or rely on automated time-based resolution.

Create EscrowLearn more →

Decentralized Trust

Everything you need for secure transactions

Secure Lock
Buyer creates an escrow, sets a deadline, and deposits MATIC securely into the smart contract.
Manual Release
Upon receiving the goods or services, the buyer manually approves and releases funds to the seller.
Auto-Resolution
If the deadline passes and the buyer is inactive, funds are automatically released to the seller.
